title: triticum loliaceum
intro: Triticum loliaceum, also known as loly grass, is a type of wild grass native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the wheat family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Triticum loliaceum include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Triticum loliaceum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
